title: ATDD 'empty system per scenario' followed only in spirit
evidence: test/test_helper.exs:3 loads the full dataset once via Application.ensure_all_started; acceptance tests run async:true against a single shared read-only :persistent_term dataset (lib/brazilian_soccer/store.ex:1002) rather than each scenario starting from an empty system and seeding its own data
suggestion: Acceptable for a fixed provided dataset — tests are still atomic/independent (no shared mutable state). To follow the prompt literally, seed a per-test fixture via Store.put/1.

title: Coverage beyond spec: Série B/C, venue and min-rating filters
evidence: lib/brazilian_soccer/loader.ex:163-164 maps Serie B/Serie C; lib/brazilian_soccer/teams.ex:430 venue=home/away/all; lib/brazilian_soccer/players.ex:546 min_overall filter
suggestion: None — these exceed the required capabilities and are tested.

title: Cross-source de-duplication and single-authoritative-source standings
evidence: lib/brazilian_soccer/loader.ex:237 dedupe_matches/1; lib/brazilian_soccer/competitions.ex:620 @source_priority + pick_source/3 avoid double-counting the same fixture across overlapping CSVs
suggestion: None — directly addresses the spec's data-quality notes; verified by standings/stats acceptance tests (e.g. 2019 Brasileirão = 380 matches, Flamengo 90 pts).
